def positive_helper_collection_object_also_owns_process_lifecycle():
    rule_id = "helper_collection_object_also_owns_process_lifecycle"
    family = "structure"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag collection-like helper objects that also start, stop, or supervise process lifecycle work."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
